form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 7 at Pakenham 0 - 62 on April 2 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Pray Day with 58.5kg at $9.50. The start before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at Geelong Bm56 on March 22 over 1535m, 0.8 len behind Il Cielo with 61.5kg at $7. Definite winning chance. Solid top three prospects.
